name: open-design
description: Local-first design product: detects your installed code-agent CLI, runs design skills + design systems, streams artifacts into a sandboxed preview.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @open-design/sidecar-proto test && pnpm --filter @open-design/sidecar test && pnpm --filter @open-design/platform test && pnpm --filter @open-design/web test && pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon test && pnpm --filter @open-design/e2e test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @open-design/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/sidecar-proto typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/sidecar typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/platform typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/tools-dev typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/desktop typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon typecheck && pnpm --filter @open-design/daemon build && pnpm --filter @open-design/e2e exec tsc -p ../scripts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @open-design/e2e typecheck && pnpm check:residual-js
